description.value: Price 3,500 gp; Slot body; CL 5th Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint evocation APPEARANCE Sewn in a traditional style, this white robe bears several golden embellishments. EFFECTS The robe is under a constant prestidigitation spell that removes any dirt or stains while preventing wrinkles. Once per day as an immediate action, the wearer can repel one creature physically touching her (such as a creature targeting her with a touch spell or a combat maneuver ). The target of this effect takes 5d4 points of force damage and is pushed 10 feet in a direction specified by the wearer. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,750 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells force punch, prestidigitation
